strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React (9+ years, matches primary stack)
Proven track record in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (re:cinq, MCP code generators)
Strong problem-solving and architecture skills demonstrated across diverse projects (e.g., GISCollective, Optilyz)
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Nest.js (primary backend framework) in resume
No clear evidence of Vitest (testing framework) usage in listed projects
Short tenure at current role (since April 2025) may raise questions about stability
response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates exceptional full-stack expertise with TypeScript/Node.js and React, along with cutting-edge AI-agent development experience. However, the resume lacks explicit references to key primary technologies (Nest.js, Vitest) and shows very recent role changes, which warrants caution. His breadth of experience across diverse stacks and problem-solving track record are strong positives.
